description: Record tool-level file activity for traceability and later memory synthesis.

steps.run: Read git status and touched target files around each tool execution.
steps.intent: Track what changed and what did not.

steps.run: Append one JSON object per tool invocation into the daily tool log.
Rewrite latest.md with the union of touched files for the active task.
steps.intent: Give the next agent a quick handoff view.

acceptance: Each entry is attributable to a task id and actor.
latest.md can be read quickly without parsing JSONL.
